title: cieca warei
intro: Cieca warei, also known as Cieca warei or Warea, is a flowering plant native to New Zealand. The plant has been used in traditional Maori medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Cieca warei are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation and improve immune function, and it has been used to treat various health conditions such as wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory infections. Herbal preparations of Cieca warei can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water or using them in a tincture to harness its medicinal properties.
